  "rationale": "The transmitter installation is in-service but lacks the required heat tracing on freeze-prone impulse lines. This violates API RP 551 winterization recommendations and engineered site specifications, posing a high risk of line freezing, plugging, or physical damage during cold weather, which would cause loss of process control or containment.",
